title: Household runtime foundation
notes: Core runtime exists with config, planning, approvals, and status surfaces, but not all integrations are live.

title: Create household configuration model
notes: Implemented in household config and runtime loading; summary command verifies users, rooms, and modes.

title: Implement permission engine
notes: Risk classes, approval staging, and second-factor handling are implemented in the runtime.

title: Implement request planner
notes: Planner returns module, model tier, approval class, and rationale.

title: Add local dashboard and API surface
notes: Dashboard is live on http://127.0.0.1:8787 with status, briefing, approvals, activity, and command surfaces.

title: Add audit and activity persistence
notes: Approval queue and activity logging persist across runtime actions.

title: Voice, OpenAI routing, and operator shell
notes: Epic 2 now has a runtime-backed voice shell, OpenClaw bridge envelope, realtime transcription boot path, and config-backed wake-word and context inference. Remaining work is production hardening rather than missing core slices.

title: Add OpenAI model routing config
notes: Text, router, and realtime models are configured as gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.4-nano, and gpt-realtime-1.5.

title: Build local morning briefing command
notes: CLI briefing flow works and dashboard briefing endpoints are present.

title: Define OpenClaw bridge seam
notes: Added a serializable OpenClaw bridge envelope and CLI export path while keeping household policy in Python.

title: Build one-shot greeting demo
notes: apex_hello.py successfully loads env, calls OpenAI, synthesizes ElevenLabs speech, and plays local audio.

title: Build interactive listen/respond/speak prototype
notes: apex_hello.py now supports loop mode, text-input mode, device listing, and speech playback.

title: Upgrade prototype to realtime streaming voice session
notes: Added OpenAI Realtime transcription session support with server-side VAD and verified that the session boots successfully.

title: Add wake word
notes: voice
column12: Added config-backed wake-word detection plus heuristic speaker and room inference using transcript content and input-device context.

title: Executive work and Chronicle assistance
notes: Epic 3 now has structured executive workstreams, meeting-prep and follow-up commands, Chronicle/devotional hooks, confidentiality review, and evidence-tiered research summaries.

title: Add executive work mode planner
notes: Planner now distinguishes executive workstreams such as meeting-prep, meeting-followup, manuscript-editing, research-summary, and confidentiality-filter.

title: Add meeting prep and follow-up surfaces
notes: Added meeting-brief and meeting-followup commands backed by structured executive prompts.

title: Add Chronicle and devotional mode hooks
notes: Added devotional-pause, chronicle-capture, and chronicle-timeline flows with local Chronicle storage seam.

title: Add confidentiality tagging and redaction filters
notes: Added confidentiality-review with sensitive-term detection, email redaction, and safe-to-share flagging.

title: Add cited research summaries and evidence tiers
notes: Added research-summary flow that organizes findings into A/B/C evidence tiers and explicit uncertainty.

title: Family logistics and home modes
notes: Epic 4 now has local mode state, manual transitions, family logistics planning, staged message drafts, richer dashboard surfaces, and explicit anomaly/watch outputs.

title: Add household mode transitions
notes: Added scheduled mode inference plus manual mode-transition and mode-status commands with persisted state.

title: Add family logistics planner
notes: Added family-plan command and API for calm sequencing, conflicts, reminders, and contingency planning.

title: Add outbound message drafting guardrails
notes: Added staged message-draft and message-drafts flows that explicitly prepare without sending.

title: Add daily household snapshot cards and timeline
notes: Restarted and verified the richer dashboard surface with active mode, family focus, departure checklist, drafts, and timeline data.

title: Add sensor-backed anomaly monitoring
notes: Added explicit anomaly-watch command and API, backed by household snapshot details and watch-item classification until live sensors are wired.

title: Child-safe tutoring
notes: Epic 5 now has child boundary enforcement, OpenAI-backed tutoring sessions, persistent parent-visible summaries, and dashboard/API surfaces.

title: Add child profile boundaries
notes: Child requests are now policy-gated in the runtime, with forbidden adult modules and blocked topic checks plus explicit denial responses.

title: Add tutoring response policy
notes: Added tutoring mode with Socratic coaching, quiz and presentation support, assignment-boundary redirects, and persistent session logging.

title: Add parent-visible tutoring summaries
notes: Added parent summary rollups, per-child tutoring sessions, CLI access, and dashboard/API surfaces for recent coaching patterns.

title: Workshop and maker copilot
notes: Epic 6 now has a workshop subsystem with planning, printer status seam, persistent inspections, staged vendor packages, approval gating, and dashboard/API surfaces.

title: Add workshop mode planner
notes: Added workshop-plan flow with material, safety, and prototype sequencing guidance through CLI, runtime, and browser APIs.

title: Add printer status adapter seam
notes: Added workshop profile-backed printer status seam plus integration status reporting and dashboard visibility for the simulated Bambu path.

title: Add part scanning and visual inspection ingress
notes: Added inspect-part flow with persistent inspection storage, diagnosis, material/process recommendations, and optional image-path ingress metadata.

title: Add vendor-prep approval flow
notes: Added vendor-prep staging with approval queue creation, persistent package storage, and dashboard/API surfaces for review.

title: Home Assistant credentials are not configured
notes: Runtime status explicitly reports missing HOME_ASSISTANT_URL or HOME_ASSISTANT_TOKEN.

title: No live household entity map exists
notes: Garage, freezer, lights, locks, and room choreography cannot be automated until real entity names are mapped.

title: No live calendar or reminder provider is mapped
notes: Family logistics now works locally, but calendar-aware planning remains simulated until real sources are connected.

title: No live Bambu or workshop integration is wired
notes: Local workshop workflows now exist, but printer telemetry and upload paths are still simulated until a real Bambu or fabrication adapter is connected.

title: Production speech-to-speech streaming and interruption are not implemented yet
notes: Realtime transcription is live, but the reply path still uses Responses plus ElevenLabs rather than a single full-duplex speech session.

title: Wake word and speaker/room inference are heuristic rather than ambient-grade
notes: The local layer works from config, device mapping, and transcript cues, but not yet from dedicated wake-word or biometric speaker models.

title: BMAD and OpenClaw wizard flow is not a reliable primary build path
notes: The wizard drifts into optional channel setup, so it is useful for structure but not as the main execution engine.
